C1310D_LVL_OF_CNSCSNS_IND C1310D Signs and Symptoms of Delirium: Altered Level of Consciousness CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident exhibits signs and symptoms of altered level of consciousness. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=Behavior not present
 1=Behavior continuously present, does not fluctuate
 2=Behavior present, fluctuates (comes and goes, changes in severity)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective10/01/2016
644 GG0130A1_EATG_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130A1_EATG_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130A1 Self
